name: Client Operating Model Phase 4 Hierarchy and Task Contracts
outcome_goal: Produce the hierarchy management and task environment contract implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not make human approval the default blocking path.
Do not mutate contract revisions in place.

jobs.label: phase_04_hierarchy_task_contracts_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_04_hierarchy_task_contracts/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 4: Hierarchy Management and Task Environment Contracts. Cover business hierarchy, ownership/stewardship, SOP refs, allowed tools, read/write scopes, model policy, verifier refs, append-only revisions, staleness, tests, and validation. Do not edit code.
